description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.7 Docker image and sets the JEKYLL_ENV variable to production. Include a global before_script that runs `bundle update --bundler` then `bundle install`. Define a single stage deploy and a job named pages that runs in this stage, executes `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. No additional services, caches, or extra artifacts are required.
